title: Align portfolio policy contract metadata
summary: Record the canonical no-required-GitHub-Actions branch protection policy in Config/repo-contract.json so local repo rules stay aligned with the HumbleControl-owned portfolio contract.
acceptance_criteria: Config/repo-contract.json declares branch_protection_policy with required_status_checks.contexts=[] and required_status_checks.checks=[].
Config/repo-contract.json declares github_actions_policy and required_checks_policy forbidding required default-branch GitHub Actions checks by default.
Config/repo-contract.json declares exceptions=[] and stale_file_policy so local policy drift is ticketed and aligned.
The repo contract validator and git diff whitespace check pass.

evidence.note: Repo contract validation passed after recording portfolio policy metadata.
Ticket validation passed for the portfolio policy metadata ticket.
Whitespace check passed for the portfolio policy metadata diff.

trigger.source_ref: HC-0116 portfolio policy audit found missing workflow policy metadata.

agent_notes: Keep this ticket scoped to metadata alignment; do not edit release/deploy/notarization workflows here.
